daily.today_energy: Your vibe is all about authenticity today. Mercury's whispering secrets that make you question what you've been accepting without thinking. Trust that restless feeling—it's pointing you toward something real.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the shift in your energy, and honestly? It's magnetic. Whether you're single or coupled up, today's about showing up as your actual self, not the version you think people want.
daily.career: Your ideas have weight right now. Don't downplay what you're thinking in meetings or group chats. The universe is basically asking you to speak up and see what happens when you do.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive rather than obligated. Your nervous system's responding well to joy-based activity today.

weekly.overview: Your vibe this week is all about authentic self-expression, Sag. The cosmos is nudging you to speak your truth without overthinking it. Trust that magnetic energy you naturally carry—it's working harder than you think.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, this is your moment to be unapologetically you. Someone's gonna be drawn to that realness. If you're already vibing with someone, deeper convos are on the menu.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are sharp right now. This isn't the week to play small—pitch that idea, take the meeting, show up differently. Your professional energy is giving main character energy.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and listen more. Moving mindfully—whether that's yoga, walks, or just stretching—will feel way better than pushing hard. Rest is productive too.
